parameters.name: computedat
parameters.label: Compute Shader
parameters.description: Points to the holding the Compute . Drag & Drop a here, or manually enter the path to the .

parameters.name: shaderdispatchmode
parameters.label: Shader Dispatch Mode
parameters.description: Specifies the compute shader dispatch mode.

parameters.name: numelems
parameters.label: Number of Elements
parameters.description: The number of elements when setting it manually with a parameter.

parameters.name: numelemspop
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: reference when setting the number of elements from an attribute.

parameters.name: numelemsclass
parameters.label: Num Elements Attrib
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the number of elements can be found.

parameters.name: numthreadsbatchmode
parameters.label: Number of Threads per Batch Mode
parameters.description: Sets how the number of threads per primitive batch is determined.

parameters.name: ptoutputattrs
parameters.label: Point Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input point attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: primoutputattrs
parameters.label: Prim Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input primitive attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: vertoutputattrs
parameters.label: Vert Output Attributes
parameters.description: The vertex attributes to output.

parameters.name: outputaccess
parameters.label: Output Access
parameters.description: Controls whether the attribute buffers can only be read from or read from and written to.

parameters.name: initoutputattrs
parameters.label: Initialize Output Attributes
parameters.description: Copy input attributes values for existing attributes, set the attributes values to their defaults for new attributes. It's a separate compute shader dispatch happening before the custom compute shader

parameters.name: input
parameters.label: Input
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks managing the inputs of the .

parameters.name: input0pops
parameters.label: In POPs
parameters.description: Allows to specify additional input POPs besides connected POPs.

parameters.name: simplexnoise
parameters.label: TDSimplexNoise()
parameters.description: Sets the implementation to use for a simplex noise method that can be called in the shader.

parameters.name: numthreadsmode
parameters.label: Number of Threads
parameters.description: Selects how to set the number of threads for the custom compute shader dispatch.

parameters.name: render
parameters.label: Render
parameters.description: Enables rendering in the viewer. Disable when output data is in an intermediate or non-renderable state

parameters.name: maxpointsmode
parameters.label: Max Points
parameters.description: Determines if the maximum number of points is determined by the input or by a custom value.

parameters.name: pointcountinfo
parameters.label: Point Count Info
parameters.description: Input point count source.

parameters.name: pointcountmode
parameters.label: Point Count
parameters.description: Output point count source.

parameters.name: pointcountpop
parameters.label: Point Count POP
parameters.description: that holds the point count.

parameters.name: pointcountclass
parameters.label: Point Count Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute class of the attribute that holds the point count.

parameters.name: maxtrianglesmode
parameters.label: Max Triangles
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of triangle primitives. If the topology info is on the CPU, that's the actual number of triangle primitives.

parameters.name: maxquadsmode
parameters.label: Max Quads
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of quadrilaterals primitives. If the topology info is on the CPU, that's the actual number of quadrilateral primitives.

parameters.name: maxlinestripsmode
parameters.label: Max Line Strips
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the maximum number of line strips.

parameters.name: maxlsvertsmode
parameters.label: Max Line Strip Verts
parameters.description: Sets the max number of line strip vertices. If the topology is on the CPU, that's the actual number of line strip vertices.

parameters.name: maxlinesmode
parameters.label: Max Lines
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the maximum number of line primitives.

parameters.name: maxpointprimsmode
parameters.label: Max Point Prims
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of point primitives.

parameters.name: lsinfoupdate
parameters.label: Line Strip Info Update
parameters.description: Allows you to choose how the Line Strip Info buffers get updated.

parameters.name: lsinfopop
parameters.label: Line Strip Info POP
parameters.description: with the attribute to use for the Line Strip Info buffer.

parameters.name: lsinfoclass
parameters.label: Line Strip Info Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the line strip info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: lsindexpop
parameters.label: Line Strip Index per Vert POP
parameters.description: with the attribute to use for the Line Strip Index per Vert buffer.

parameters.name: lsindexclass
parameters.label: Line Strip Index per Vert Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the line strip index per vertex attribute can be found.

parameters.name: lsmaxvertsoverride
parameters.label: Max Verts per Line Strip
parameters.description: Specifies you want to set the max number of verts per line strip.allocation.

parameters.name: initoutputprims
parameters.label: Initialize Output Primitives
parameters.description: Copy input primitives (point index values) and set point index for new primitives to 0.

parameters.name: topoinfo
parameters.label: Topology Info
parameters.description: Sets the topology information source.

parameters.name: topoinfopop
parameters.label: Topology Info POP
parameters.description: Sets reference to a where the info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: topoinfoclass
parameters.label: Topology Info Attributes Class
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: trianglecountmode
parameters.label: Triangle Count
parameters.description: The triangle count when setting it manually with a parameter.

parameters.name: quadcountmode
parameters.label: Quad Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of quad primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: linestripcountmode
parameters.label: Line Strip Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of line strips from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: lsvertcountmode
parameters.label: Line Strip Vert Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the vertex count of line strips from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: linecountmode
parameters.label: Line Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of line primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: pointprimcountmode
parameters.label: Point Prim Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of point primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: extraout
parameters.label: Extra Output
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to declare additional outputs that can be picked with GLSL Select.

parameters.name: extraout0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the extra output.

parameters.name: extraout0pop
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: extraout0ptattrs
parameters.label: Point Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input point attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: extraout0primattrs
parameters.label: Prim Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input primitive attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: extraout0vertattrs
parameters.label: Vert Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input vertex attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: extraout0outputaccess
parameters.label: Output Access
parameters.description: Controls whether the attribute buffers can only be read from or read from and written to.

parameters.name: extraout0copyinputattrs
parameters.label: Copy Input Attributes
parameters.description: For allocated output attributes, whether to initialize them with the input values.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0class
parameters.label: New Attribute Class
parameters.description: The attribute class for the new attribute.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: New Attribute Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: New Attribute Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: attr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: attr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Array Size of the new attribute.

parameters.name: matattr
parameters.label: Matrix Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new matrix attributes.

parameters.name: matattr0class
parameters.label: Matrix Attribute Class
parameters.description: Determines the attribute class where the matrix attribute can be created.

parameters.name: matattr0name
parameters.label: Custom Matrix Name
parameters.description: Determines the new matrix attribute name.

parameters.name: matattr0numrows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: Number of rows in the matrix - 2, 3 or 4.

parameters.name: matattr0numcols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in the matrix - 2, 3 or 4.

parameters.name: matattr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: matattr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Nunber of elements in the array of matrices.

parameters.name: matattr0qualifier
parameters.label: Qualifier
parameters.description: Additional detail on how the attribute should be interpreted.

parameters.name: color
parameters.label: Color
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for color uniforms.

parameters.name: color0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the color uniform.

parameters.name: color0alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vec
parameters.label: Vector
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to define uniform variables.

parameters.name: vec0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the vector uniform.

parameters.name: vec0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The numeric representation of the attribute values.

parameters.name: sampler
parameters.label: Sampler
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Samplers to read from the shader.

parameters.name: sampler0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the sampler uniform.

parameters.name: sampler0top
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Sets reference to a to sample.

parameters.name: sampler0extendu
parameters.label: Extend U
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the U texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0extendv
parameters.label: Extend V
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the V texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0extendw
parameters.label: Extend W
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the W texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: Controls the pixel filtering on the input image of the .

parameters.name: array
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for array uniforms.

parameters.name: array0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the array uniform.

parameters.name: array0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The number of components for the array.

parameters.name: array0chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: The for the current uniform.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.label: Matrix
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks of matrix uniforms.

parameters.name: matrix0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the matrix uniform.

parameters.name: matrix0value
parameters.label: Matrix
parameters.description: The value to assign the matrix. For valid ways to specify this, see the Matrix Parameters article.

parameters.name: tempbuffer
parameters.label: Temp Buffer
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks  for Temporary buffers used to pass information to the shader as uniforms.

parameters.name: tempbuffer0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the temporary buffer.

parameters.name: tempbuffer0initval
parameters.label: Initial Value
parameters.description: Initial value for the current temporary buffer.

parameters.name: const
parameters.label: Constant
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Specialization Constants.

parameters.name: const0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the constant.

parameters.name: const0value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attr0value3
parameters.label: Attr0Value3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: color0rgbb
parameters.label: Color0Rgbb
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
